message:
perf(providers/anthropic): eliminate redundant clone_from at
content_block_stop — accumulator already contains final text

- In handle_content_block_stop, the current_text/current_thinking
  accumulators already contain the full content from push_str during
  delta processing — the clone_from back into ContentBlock was
  duplicating work that's already done
- Remove the dead clone_from calls and use _ bindings since the
  ContentBlock fields are already up to date
- Adds clarifying comments explaining why the take is sufficient

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
